hypothesis: A ∆-learning XGBoost model that predicts the difference between GFN1-xTB and DFT (PBE/HSE06) band gaps using the selected structural and compositional descriptors will yield significantly more accurate DFT-level band gap predictions for MOFs (lower MAE) than a direct XGBoost model trained to predict DFT band gaps from descriptors alone and will achieve accuracy comparable to fine-tuned deep-learning models (MOFTransformer, CGCNN).
